kudos.label: Recognition Movement
kudos.title: Sun* Kudos
kudos.detail:
WHAT'S NEW IN SAA 2025
A colleague recognition and appreciation activity — held for the first time for all Sunners. Launching in November 2025, it encourages Sun* people to share words of recognition and thanks for colleagues on the system announced by the organizers. This will serve as reference material for the Heads Council during the award selection process.
